data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for appliance installation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of multiple aspects of the appliance installation process, including photo documentation, customer signature capture, and payment processing. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of these features, such as API reads or persisted state checks. As a result, the requirement remains unverified, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of mobile signature capture functionality or API endpoints to validate this feature.
No evidence of API endpoints or functionality to validate the linking of photo documentation to signatures.
No evidence of API endpoints or functionality to validate the auto-charging of payment upon signature confirmation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for appliance installation process
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the appliance installation requirement.
